moves.name: Frost Thread
moves.description: Springs backward off the balls of both feet while whipping both wrists forward, releasing twin wires that arc through the air in a horizontal X pattern at chest height.
moves.image_snapshot: Leaning backward at a 45-degree angle, weight on both balls of feet, both arms extended forward with wrists cocked back, wires streaming outward in an X shape. Motion blur on both wrists and wires.

moves.name: Predator Spiral
moves.description: Leaps into a full front flip, tucking both knees to chest mid-rotation before extending into a horizontal axe-kick with the right leg while the left leg remains extended backward.
moves.image_snapshot: Mid-air, body upside-down and fully horizontal, right leg extended straight down at a 90-degree angle from torso, left leg extended straight backward, both arms spread wide. Motion blur on right leg.

moves.name: Snap Freeze
moves.description: Drives the right fist straight forward while pivoting on the left foot, shifting weight aggressively forward and snapping the torso from a twisted stance to fully squared.
moves.image_snapshot: Deep lunge on left leg, right fist extended straight forward at shoulder height, left arm pulled back to hip, torso twisted 45 degrees. Speed lines on right fist.
